text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Why is Hezbollah Lebanon and the ceasefire in Lebanon part of our ceasefire? Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: "For years, Hezbollah has been fighting with the Zionist regime, but truly this recent war that Hezbollah started — here, Hezbollah started it for…" 🇮🇷 "They were definitely the ones seeking ceasefire. If today we temporarily accepted the ceasefire, it's so that they yield to our demands. The enemy's entire effort was to impose his own demands on us." — Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 为什么黎巴嫩真主党和黎巴嫩的停火是我们停火的一部分？议长卡利巴夫：‘多年来，真主党一直在与犹太复国主义政权作战，但实际上真主党发起的这场最近的战争——在这里，真主党发起它是为了……’” 🇮🇷 “他们绝对是寻求停火的一方。如果今天我们暂时接受了停火，那是因为要让他们屈服于我们的要求。敌人的全部努力就是要把他自己的要求强加给我们。”——议长卡利巴夫 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Ireland's former PM says what's in the interests of farmers and the agricultural industry is now "not in the interests of Ireland," as 80% of food is imported and with "so many cattle" there is not enough grass to feed them, so grain is imported from Mercosur countries. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045632292568129625/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息——爱尔兰前总理表示，符合农民和农业利益的事情现在“不符合爱尔兰的利益”，因为 80% 的食物是进口的，而且由于“牛太多”，没有足够的草来喂养它们，因此从南方共同市场国家进口谷物。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045632292568129625/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Syria's Ministry of Interior posts the same suspect twice on two different crimes. Twice in the same month, once under the pretext of a "sabotage plot" targeting Damascus's security, and again eight days later on charges of joining another "terrorist cell." The Interior Ministry of the interim government published a photo of the same person on Facebook, in two separate security operations, eight days apart. The ministry attempted to rectify the situation shortly afterward with a statement on the official news channel, claiming that the person whose photo appeared twice "was coordinating between the two cells." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 叙利亚内政部在两起不同的犯罪案件中两次发布了同一名嫌疑人的照片。在同一个月内，第一次是以针对大马士革安全的“破坏阴谋”为借口，八天后又以加入另一个“恐怖组织”的罪名再次发布。过渡政府内政部在Facebook上发布了同一人的照片，涉及两起相隔八天的独立安全行动。内政部随后不久试图通过官方新闻频道发表声明来纠正这一情况，声称照片出现两次的那个人“是在两个组织之间进行协调”。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 "At every moment, if the enemy makes a mistake and takes action — we have no trust in the enemy whatsoever. Right now as we are sitting here, it's possible at this very moment they could start the war a second time." Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: In the…" 🇮🇷 Why is Hezbollah Lebanon and the ceasefire in Lebanon part of our ceasefire? Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: "For years, Hezbollah has been fighting with the Zionist regime, but truly this recent war that Hezbollah started — here, Hezbollah started it for the sake of the Islamic Republic. The resistance front came to the aid of the Islamic Republic." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 “如果敌人犯错并采取行动，我们随时——我们对敌人没有任何信任。就在我们坐在这里的这一刻，他们随时可能第二次发动战争。”议长卡利巴夫：在……” 🇮🇷 为什么黎巴嫩真主党和黎巴嫩的停火是我们停火的一部分？议长卡利巴夫：“多年来，真主党一直在与犹太复国主义政权作战，但实际上真主党最近发动的这场战争——在这里，真主党是为了伊斯兰共和国而发动的。抵抗阵线前来援助伊斯兰共和国。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Iran's Speaker of Parliament Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf says there are differences with the US over the nuclear file and the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045626044619825440/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，伊朗与美国在核问题和霍尔木兹海峡问题上存在分歧。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045626044619825440/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Not a great sign when someone needs a full weeklong event just to convince people they’re a Christian. Trump will take part in a weeklong public reading of the Bible in Washington, D.C., organized by conservative Christian leaders. Source: NYT https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045615778452459918/photo/1 - Clash Report tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 当一个人需要整整一周的活动才能让人们相信他是基督徒时，这可不是什么好兆头。特朗普将参加由保守派基督教领袖在华盛顿特区组织的为期一周的公开诵读《圣经》活动。来源：《纽约时报》 https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045615778452459918/photo/1 - Clash Report 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The Strait of Hormuz has cleared out tonight after Iranian forces announced a closure and attacked multiple commercial ships. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045623108187353538/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在伊朗军队宣布封锁并袭击多艘商船后，霍尔木兹海峡今晚已清空。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045623108187353538/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US intelligence assessment is that Iran retains around 40% of its prewar stockpile of drones, according to NY Times report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《纽约时报》报道，美国情报评估显示，伊朗仍保留了其战前约 40% 的无人机库存。推文

text: OSINTtechnical US intelligence assesses that Iran still retains 40% of its prewar stockpile of drones, and after conducting operations to dig up buried missile cities during the ceasefire, 60% of its missile launchers -NYT tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国情报评估显示，伊朗仍保留了其战前 40% 的无人机库存，并且在停火期间进行了挖掘地下导弹城的行动后，保留了 60% 的导弹发射器 -《纽约时报》推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Nearly 10% of U.S. births in 2023 came from illegal immigrant mothers, according to newly published research from Pew Research Center - the highest number since 2010. https://www.disclose.tv/id/eiv1f4iyqa/ tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 根据皮尤研究中心最新发布的研究，2023 年美国近 10% 的新生儿来自非法移民母亲，这是自 2010 年以来的最高数字。https://www.disclose.tv/id/eiv1f4iyqa/ 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 "In Isfahan, Trump faced a disgrace worse than the disgrace of Tabas. He decided to use counter-revolutionaries from our borders — whatever effort he made, he did not succeed. He sought internal unrest both before the war and after. He could not actually…" 🇮🇷 "At every moment, if the enemy makes a mistake and takes action — we have no trust in the enemy whatsoever. Right now as we are sitting here, it's possible at this very moment they could start the war a second time." Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: In the battlefield domain, the armed forces' readiness is of this nature. It's not that when we are negotiating, the battlefield section stops. To the same extent that people are in the streets, they too are ready for their actions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 “在伊斯法罕，特朗普遭遇了比塔巴斯更严重的耻辱。他决定利用我们边境的反革命分子——无论他做出什么努力，都没有成功。他在战前和战后都寻求内部动乱。他实际上无法……” 🇮🇷 “在任何时刻，如果敌人犯错并采取行动——我们对敌人没有任何信任。就在我们坐在这里的时候，他们随时可能第二次发动战争。”议会议长卡利巴夫：在战场领域，武装部队的战备状态就是这样。并不是说我们在谈判时，战场部分就会停止。正如人们在街头一样，他们也为自己的行动做好了准备。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 "We should know this: in this war, we are the winners of the battlefield. Equipment, capabilities, and money are certainly effective in victory, but it doesn't always happen." Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: In an asymmetric war with them, we fought with…" 🇮🇷 "In Isfahan, Trump faced a disgrace worse than the disgrace of Tabas. He decided to use counter-revolutionaries from our borders — whatever effort he made, he did not succeed. He sought internal unrest both before the war and after. He could not actually do this work." — Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf on US failures 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 ‘我们应该知道这一点：在这场战争中，我们是战场上的赢家。装备、能力和金钱在胜利中固然有效，但情况并非总是如此。’ 议会议长卡利巴夫：在与他们的非对称战争中，我们用……进行了战斗” 🇮🇷 “在伊斯法罕，特朗普遭遇了比塔巴斯更严重的耻辱。他决定利用我们边境的反革命分子——无论他做出什么努力，他都没有成功。他在战前和战后都寻求内部动荡。他实际上无法完成这项工作。” ——议会议长卡利巴夫谈美国失败 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 NYT: A senior delegation from the US visited Cuba last week to discuss a deal to address the humanitarian crisis on the island. The delegation warned Cuba's government that it had a narrow window of time to make economic and political changes demanded by the Trump administration. U.S. officials emphasized, however, that the U.S. isn't considering any specific or immienet operations against Cuba. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 《纽约时报》：美国一个高级代表团上周访问了古巴，讨论解决该岛人道主义危机的协议。代表团警告古巴政府，在特朗普政府要求的经济和政治变革方面，他们只有很短的时间窗口。然而，美国官员强调，美国并未考虑针对古巴采取任何具体或迫在眉睫的行动。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: I am ready for martyrdom. We are ready both to shed blood and to endure deep hardship.
text_zh: 伊朗议长卡利巴夫：我已做好殉道的准备。我们既准备好流血，也准备好忍受深重的苦难。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: "What our Martyred Imam always said: 'Don't think this revolution, this Iran, this country relies on us — it relies on God, it relies on this nation. Even in our absence, this will continue forward.'" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials…" 🇮🇷 "We should know this: in this war, we are the winners of the battlefield. Equipment, capabilities, and money are certainly effective in victory, but it doesn't always happen." Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: In an asymmetric war with them, we fought with our own design, with our own preparation. The enemy had these things, but the power of design and the method of using them and they did not act correctly. They make wrong strategic decisions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 议会议长卡利巴夫：‘我们殉道的伊玛目总是说：不要认为这场革命、这个伊朗、这个国家依赖于我们——它依赖于上帝，它依赖于这个国家。即使我们不在了，这一切也会继续向前发展。’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体……” 🇮🇷 “我们应该知道这一点：在这场战争中，我们是战场上的赢家。装备、能力和金钱在胜利中固然有效，但情况并非总是如此。” 议会议长卡利巴夫：在与他们的非对称战争中，我们用自己的设计、自己的准备进行了战斗。敌人拥有这些东西，但设计能力和使用方法，他们并没有正确行事。他们做出了错误的战略决策。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Tehran confronted U.S. minesweeping efforts in the Strait of Hormuz during the Islamabad talks and warned that any advance would be met with fire. The U.S. requested 15 minutes to order a…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf explains how Iran was able to fight an asymmetrical war against the U.S. "I would like to make a point here. This does not mean that we are stronger in military power than the United States. There are two reasons for this. The Americans have more money than us. They have more equipment than us. They have more resources than us. That is why they have committed crimes in the world. Because their work is always offensive. They have more experience than us. The Zionist regime, which is active and active in the region, and for their own benefit, as you saw in the previous war, pointed out that if in the previous US government, if there was no Israel, we would have created an Israel in the region. In reality, their gendarmes want to do their job here. Well, they also have superior power. Sometimes I see my dear people say that we have destroyed them. No, we have not destroyed them. We are the winners of the battlefield in this war. We have been able to do this. This is an important point to know. Of course, equipment, resources, and money have an impact on war and victory. But this does not always happen. We fought a war against them without their permission. We fought with our own plans and our own readiness. We fought against the enemy without their permission. But we did not use our own plans and strategies properly. What I am saying is that they are making wrong strategic decisions. For example, they are making wrong decisions about our people. They are also making wrong decisions about their own strategic plans. I said in the last episode that the US government is the first, but in reality, Israel is the first, because they are making wrong decisions about their own strategic plans. I want to say this. Why? I sometimes hear from our dear friends, and even some of my own national media, that we have destroyed all the military forces. Let's destroy the rest of them too. Let's not negotiate. I want to say that we are definitely the winner of the battlefield. This is why Trump has a request for a ceasefire. We have to realise this." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，德黑兰在伊斯兰堡会谈期间对抗了美国的扫雷行动，并警告称任何推进都将遭到火力回击。美国请求15分钟时间来下令……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫解释了伊朗如何能够与美国进行非对称战争。“我想在这里说明一点。这并不意味着我们在军事力量上比美国更强大。原因有二。美国人的钱比我们多。他们的装备比我们多。他们的资源比我们多。这就是为什么他们在世界上犯下罪行。因为他们的工作总是进攻性的。他们的经验比我们多。在地区活跃并为自身利益服务的犹太复国主义政权，正如你们在之前的战争中所看到的那样，指出如果在美国上届政府中没有以色列，我们就会在地区内创造一个以色列。实际上，他们的宪兵想在这里做他们的工作。好吧，他们也拥有优势力量。有时我看到我亲爱的人民说我们已经摧毁了他们。不，我们没有摧毁他们。在这场战争中，我们是战场上的赢家。我们已经能够做到这一点。这是一个需要知道的重要点。当然，装备、资源和金钱对战争和胜利有影响。但这并不总是发生。我们在没有得到他们许可的情况下与他们进行了战争。我们用自己的计划和自己的准备进行了战斗。我们在没有得到他们许可的情况下与敌人进行了战斗。但我们没有正确使用自己的计划和战略。我想说的是，他们正在做出错误的战略决策。例如，他们对我们的人民做出了错误的决定。他们对自己的战略计划也做出了错误的决定。我在上一集里说过，美国政府是第一位的，但实际上，以色列是第一位的，因为他们对自己的战略计划做出了错误的决定。我想说的是。为什么？我有时从我们亲爱的朋友，甚至我本国的一些媒体那里听到，我们已经摧毁了所有的军事力量。让我们也摧毁剩下的那些吧。让我们不要谈判。我想说的是，我们绝对是战场上的赢家。这就是为什么特朗普要求停火。我们必须意识到这一点。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 NYT : Iran has turned its control over the Strait of Hormuz into a powerful deterrent, regardless of any restrictions on its nuclear programme. The waterway, through which 20% of the world’s oil flows, has become a strategic lever that the US‑Israeli war has failed to break. U.S. estimates that Iran still retains about 40% of its pre‑war attack drones and upwards of 60% of its missile launchers – more than enough to hold shipping hostage in the future. While the U.S. naval blockade has largely halted Iran’s seaborne trade, Tehran has not yet retaliated, suggesting both sides see a window for negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 《纽约时报》：伊朗已将其对霍尔木兹海峡的控制转化为一种强大的威慑力，无论其核计划受到何种限制。这条全球20%石油流经的水道已成为美以战争未能打破的战略杠杆。美国估计，伊朗仍保留了战前约40%的攻击无人机和超过60%的导弹发射器——足以在未来将航运作为人质。虽然美国的海军封锁在很大程度上停止了伊朗的海上贸易，但德黑兰尚未进行报复，这表明双方都看到了谈判的窗口。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: The enemy sought regime change and to “Venezuelanize” Iran in order to auction off our oil, but it failed.
text_zh: 伊朗议长卡利巴夫：敌人寻求政权更迭，试图将伊朗“委内瑞拉化”，以便拍卖我们的石油，但它失败了。

text: North Korea launched at least one ballistic missile eastward, according to South Korea’s military. Source: Yonhap
text_zh: 据韩国军方称，朝鲜向东发射了至少一枚弹道导弹。来源：韩联社

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: We are fully prepared—if they make even the slightest mistake, we will respond with force.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：我们已做好充分准备——如果他们犯下哪怕最轻微的错误，我们将以武力回应。

text: Despite heavy strikes, Iran still retains substantial military capability—about 40% of its attack drones, roughly 60% of its missile launchers, and potentially up to 70% of its missile stockpile. Source: NYT
text_zh: 尽管遭受了沉重打击，伊朗仍保留了相当大的军事能力——约40%的攻击无人机、约60%的导弹发射器，以及可能高达70%的导弹库存。来源：《纽约时报》

text: 🇮🇷 Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: "What our Martyred Imam always said: 'Don't think this revolution, this Iran, this country relies on us — it relies on God, it relies on this nation. Even in our absence, this will continue forward.'" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 议长卡利巴夫：“我们殉道的伊玛目总是说：‘不要认为这场革命、这个伊朗、这个国家依赖于我们——它依赖于上帝，依赖于这个民族。即使我们不在了，它也会继续前进。’” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: We have not destroyed the enemy; they still possess money and weapons, but strategically they have been defeated in comparison to us.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：我们并没有摧毁敌人；他们仍然拥有金钱和武器，但在战略上，与我们相比，他们已经失败了。

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Navy is preparing in coming days to board Iranian-linked sanctioned crude oil tankers and seize commercial ships within international waters in several areas around the globe, according to U.S. officials, expanding its ongoing naval crackdown beyond the current blockade in the Middle East, the officials told the Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国官员告诉《华尔街日报》，美国海军正准备在未来几天内登临与伊朗有关的受制裁原油油轮，并在全球多个地区的国际水域扣押商船，将其正在进行的军事打击行动扩大到目前中东封锁之外。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, in a message directed at Hezbollah without naming it: "To those who gamble with Lebanon's fate and the lives of its citizens, I say, enough!" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045614991928123576/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩在给真主党的信息中（未点名）表示：“对于那些拿黎巴嫩的命运和公民的生命进行赌博的人，我说，够了！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045614991928123576/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Former Iranian Deputy FM Mohammad-Javad Larijani: "The American blockade is piracy, and Iranians don't let pirates off. The Strait of Hormuz is under Iranian control. This will not change. Nuclear talks with the U.S. are a big mistake." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045613858119622936/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗前副外长穆罕默德-贾瓦德·拉里贾尼：“美国的封锁是海盗行为，伊朗人不会放过海盗。霍尔木兹海峡处于伊朗的控制之下。这一点不会改变。与美国的核谈判是一个巨大的错误。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045613858119622936/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Islamic regime is still afraid to bury Ali Khamenei. And I still can’t believe he died by a targeted missile at his old age. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045613397345960053/photo/1 tweet

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: The enemy failed in the various plans it had—destroying the air force and missile capabilities, destroying the navy, launching a ground attack, and opening the Strait of Hormuz. In all of these, they were unsuccessful.

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: We are not militarily stronger than America. It is clear that they have more money, equipment, and resources, and because they have carried out so many aggressions around the world, they also have more experience than us. The Zionist regime, which is America’s servant and agent in the region, also possesses high power. We fought in an asymmetric war in such a way that, with our own design and preparedness, we pushed the enemy back. The enemy had money and resources but did not act correctly in design. They make mistakes in strategic decisions. They are wrong about our people, just as they are wrong in their military design. The U.S. government claims that “America First” is important to it, but in practice it has shown that Israel is first for it, because it makes decisions based on false information from Israel.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：我们在军事上并不比美国强大。显而易见，他们拥有更多的金钱、装备和资源，而且由于他们在世界各地进行了如此多的侵略，他们也比我们更有经验。作为美国在该地区的仆从和代理人，犹太复国主义政权也拥有强大的力量。我们以不对称战争的方式进行了战斗，通过我们自己的设计和准备，我们将敌人击退了。敌人有钱有资源，但在设计上行动不当。他们在战略决策上犯了错误。他们对我们人民的判断是错误的，就像他们在军事设计上一样错误。美国政府声称“美国优先”对它很重要，但实际上它表明以色列对它来说是第一位的，因为它基于以色列提供的虚假信息做出决策。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: We are definitely a head and shoulders above the past in offensive capabilities and design in the third imposed war, and we saw this on the battlefield. In the technical field, we hit about 180 drones, a capability we did not have in the defensive domain during the previous war. All of these events happened in just a few months. Hitting the F-35 is not a coincidence; it is an operation in various technical and design dimensions. With the missile that exploded near that aircraft (F-35), the enemy understood what capabilities we have and in which direction we are moving.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：在第三次强加的战争中，我们的进攻能力和设计绝对比过去高出一大截，我们在战场上看到了这一点。在技术领域，我们击中了约180架无人机，这是我们在前一场战争的防御领域所不具备的能力。所有这些事件都发生在短短几个月内。击中F-35并非巧合；这是一次在各种技术和设计维度上的行动。随着在那架飞机（F-35）附近爆炸的导弹，敌人明白了我们拥有什么能力以及我们正朝着哪个方向前进。

text: 🇰🇵 🇰🇷 North Korea has fired a ballistic missile of undetermined type in an easterly direction, Yonhap reports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸The IRGC Navy warned that the U.S. will be met with a fitting response for each breach of the deal to open the Strait of Hormuz. They added that the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed for as long as vessels coming to and from Iran remain under threat.…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The IRGC Navy's office of public relations has released a statement on the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, citing U.S. ceasefire violations as the reason for the closing of the recently reopened Strait of Hormuz. "Yesterday, following the announcement by the Islamic Republic of Iran regarding the permission for non-military vessels to pass through the Larak Corridor, several vessels passed through the Strait of Hormuz under the management and coordination of the IRGC Navy. However, due to the violation of the ceasefire conditions, the American enemy did not lift the naval blockade of Iranian vessels and ports; therefore, from this afternoon, the Strait of Hormuz is closed until this blockade is lifted. Accordingly, we warn that no vessel should move from its anchorage in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman, and approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be considered cooperation with the enemy, and the violating vessel will be targeted. We also inform all vessels and their owners to follow news only from the official IRGC Navy authority and via Channel 16, and the statements of the terrorist American president in the Strait of Hormuz and the Persian Gulf have no credibility." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军警告称，美国每违反一次开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议，都将遭到相应的回应。他们补充说，只要往返伊朗的船只继续受到威胁，霍尔木兹海峡将保持关闭……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军公共关系办公室就关闭霍尔木兹海峡发表声明，称美国违反停火协议是关闭最近重新开放的霍尔木兹海峡的原因。“昨天，在伊朗伊斯兰共和国宣布允许非军事船只通过拉拉克走廊后，几艘船只在伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的管理和协调下通过了霍尔木兹海峡。然而，由于违反了停火条件，美国敌人没有解除对伊朗船只和港口的封锁；因此，从今天下午开始，霍尔木兹海峡将关闭，直到封锁解除。据此，我们警告任何船只不得离开其在波斯湾和阿曼湾的锚地，接近霍尔木兹海峡将被视为与敌人合作，违规船只将成为目标。我们还通知所有船只及其船东，仅通过官方伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军权威机构和16频道关注新闻，恐怖主义的美国总统在霍尔木兹海峡和波斯湾的声明没有任何可信度。” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 Chronicles of the special military operation 📝 for April 18, 2026 🧨 Russian forces delivered a series of strikes against energy facilities in Chernihiv and Dnipropetrovsk Region throughout the day. A series of explosions also rang out in the vicinity of Odesa ports. The enemy attacked oil industry facilities in Crimea with drones, and also conducted a raid on a facility in Tikhoretsk . Drone impacts were also recorded in liberated territories of DNR and Zaporizhia Region . ➡️ In the Kostyantynivka direction , Russian forces are attempting to drive the enemy out of Chasiv Yar . Parallel to this, assault troops are gradually advancing through the buildings of Kostyantynivka itself, seeking to establish control in the center of the settlement. ➡️ In the Dobropillia direction , fighters of the GV "Center" cleared the northwestern part of Gryshino , with a "gray zone" still remaining on the southern outskirts. Assault troops also established control over the settlement of Utyatnik on the approaches to neighboring Novoaleksandrivka . 📎 High-resolution maps: 🔸 Situation in the special military operation zone ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Kostyantynivka direction ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Dobropillia direction ( ru ; en ) 📍 Online maps available by subscription at map.rybar.ru #digest #Dobropillia #Zaporizhia #map #Kostyantynivka #Russia #Ukraine ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文频道：📝 特别军事行动纪事 📝 2026年4月18日 🧨 俄罗斯军队全天对切尔尼戈夫州和第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克州的能源设施进行了一系列打击。敖德萨港口附近也传出了一连串爆炸声。敌方使用无人机袭击了克里米亚的石油工业设施，并对季霍列茨克的一处设施进行了突袭。在顿涅茨克人民共和国和扎波罗热州的解放领土上也记录到了无人机撞击。➡️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向，俄军正试图将敌军赶出恰索夫亚尔。与此同时，突击部队正逐渐推进穿过康斯坦丁诺夫卡本身的建筑物，试图建立对该定居点中心的控制。➡️ 在多布罗皮利亚方向，“中央”部队集群的战士清理了格里希诺的西北部，南部郊区仍处于“灰色地带”。突击部队还控制了邻近新亚历山德罗夫卡附近的新亚历山德罗夫卡定居点。📎 高分辨率地图：🔸 特别军事行动区局势（俄语；英语） 🔸 康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向（俄语；英语） 🔸 多布罗皮利亚方向（俄语；英语） 📍 在线地图可通过 map.rybar.ru 订阅获取 #摘要 #多布罗皮利亚 #扎波罗热 #地图 #康斯坦丁诺夫卡 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈️ 俄语 | ✈️ 英语 | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 支持我们 原文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 AP : Iran is not yet ready for a new round of face‑to‑face talks with the United States, a senior Iranian official said, accusing Washington of refusing to abandon “maximalist” demands. Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh also rejected President Trump’s claim that Iran would hand over its enriched uranium, stating: “No enriched material is going to be shipped to the United States. This is a non‑starter.” Khatibzadeh called for a “framework agreement” before any in‑person meeting and demanded that the US address what he called “economic terrorism” through unilateral sanctions. He reiterated that a ceasefire must extend to Lebanon, and said that as part of negotiations a “new protocol” would be established for the Strait of Hormuz to keep it “open and safe for all civilian passage.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美联社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，伊朗尚未准备好与美国进行新一轮面对面会谈，并指责华盛顿拒绝放弃“最大限度”的要求。伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德也驳斥了特朗普总统关于伊朗将移交浓缩铀的说法，称：“没有任何浓缩材料会被运往美国。这根本不可能。”哈提卜扎德呼吁在任何面对面会议之前达成一项“框架协议”，并要求美国通过单边制裁解决他所谓的“经济恐怖主义”问题。他重申停火必须扩大到黎巴嫩，并表示作为谈判的一部分，将为霍尔木兹海峡建立一项“新协议”，以保持其“对所有民用通行开放和安全”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: Vessels report that the following Very High Frequency message was broadcast by Iran warning that the Strait of Hormuz had been closed: "Attention all ships, regarding the failure ⁠of the U.S. government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiation, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz completely closed again. No vessel of any type or nationality is allowed ⁠to pass through the Strait of Hormuz." @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei to EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas: "International law is invoked by the European Union to lecture others, while silently blessing an American-Israeli war of aggression. Save your sermons. Europe's chronic failure to practice what it preaches has turned its talk of international law into the height of hypocrisy. There is no rule in international law that prevents Iran from taking the necessary measures to prevent the use of the Strait of Hormuz to launch aggression against it." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊对欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯表示：“欧盟援引国际法来教训他人，却对美以侵略战争保持沉默并给予祝福。省省你们的说教吧。欧洲长期言行不一，使其关于国际法的言论沦为虚伪的巅峰。国际法中没有任何规则禁止伊朗采取必要措施，以防止霍尔木兹海峡被用于对其实施侵略。” 推文
